title: Describe a picture
subtitle: Use there is and present continuous.
overview: Use there is and present continuous.
Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: There is a woman in the picture.
The man is walking in the street.
What can you see in the picture?
你在图片里能看到什么？
There are two children, and they are smiling.
有两个孩子，他们正在笑。

items.en: There is a woman in the picture.
The man is walking in the street.
What can you see in the picture?
items.zh: 你在图片里能看到什么？

items.en: There are two children, and they are smiling.
items.zh: 有两个孩子，他们正在笑。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What can you see in the picture?
lines.zh: 你在图片里能看到什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: There are two children, and they are smiling.
lines.zh: 有两个孩子，他们正在笑。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: There are two children, and they are smiling.
lines.zh: 有两个孩子，他们正在笑。

items.en: There is a woman in the picture.
The man is walking in the street.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
